services.marketing.title: Performance marketing
services.marketing.description: Data-driven campaigns that find your audience, win their attention, and turn clicks into customers.
services.consulting.title: Strategic consulting
services.consulting.description: Clarity on what's working, what's not, and what to do next. We help you make better decisions, faster.
services.technology.title: Custom technology
services.technology.description: Software, infrastructure, and platforms built for your specific challenges — not off-the-shelf workarounds.

services.ai.description: Automate what slows you down. Surface insights you'd otherwise miss. Ship smarter, not harder.

industries.ecommerce.title: E-commerce
industries.ecommerce.description: From platform builds to conversion optimization, we've helped e-commerce businesses at every stage. Marketing, tech, and AI — working together.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your business. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
cta.title: Let's talk growth
cta.subtitle: 30-minute call. No pitch deck. Just an honest look at where you are and where you could be.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.general.title: 1. General provisions
terms.general.body: These Terms & Conditions govern the use of services provided by GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us"). By engaging our services or using this website, you agree to these terms in full. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.services.title: 2. Scope of services
terms.services.body: GrowGroup provides marketing, consulting, technology, and AI services as described in individual project agreements. The specific scope, deliverables, and timelines are defined in a separate Statement of Work (SOW) or service agreement signed by both parties.
terms.ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
terms.ip.body: Upon full payment, all deliverables created specifically for the client become the client's property, unless stated otherwise in the project agreement. Pre-existing tools, frameworks, and methodologies used by GrowGroup remain the intellectual property of GrowGroup.
terms.payment.title: 4. Payment terms
terms.payment.body: Payment terms are defined in each project agreement. Unless otherwise specified, invoices are due within 14 days of issue. Late payments may incur interest at the statutory rate. GrowGroup reserves the right to suspend services if payments are overdue by more than 30 days.
terms.liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
terms.liability.body: GrowGroup's total liability for any claim arising from services provided shall not exceed the total fees paid by the client for the specific project in question. GrowGroup is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages, including lost profits or data.
terms.termination.title: 6. Termination
terms.termination.body: Either party may terminate an ongoing engagement with 30 days' written notice. Upon termination, the client is responsible for payment of all work completed up to the termination date. GrowGroup will provide reasonable handover of all deliverables produced.
terms.law.title: 7. Governing law
terms.law.body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Poland. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in Poland.
terms.contact.title: 8. Contact
terms.contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@grow.com.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.intro.body: GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.collect.title: 2. Information we collect
privacy.collect.body: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you fill out a contact form or schedule a consultation. We also collect technical data automatically, including IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing behavior via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.use.title: 3. How we use your data
privacy.use.body: We use your personal data to respond to inquiries and provide requested services, send project proposals and service-related communications, improve our website and services, comply with legal obligations, and — with your consent — send marketing communications about our services.
privacy.sharing.title: 4. Data sharing
privacy.sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business (e.g., hosting, analytics, CRM), but only to the extent necessary and under appropriate data processing agreements. We may also disclose data when required by law.
privacy.cookies.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.cookies.body: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
privacy.rights.title: 6. Your rights
privacy.rights.body: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data. You may also object to processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
privacy.retention.title: 7. Data retention
privacy.retention.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months unless a business relationship is established.
privacy.changes.title: 8. Changes to this policy
privacy.changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contact.title: 9. Contact
privacy.contact.body: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your data rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
